name: logistics carriers managing 50–100 shipments/day tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/day, delays in shipment statuses cause operational inefficiencies. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking and sporadic updates from carriers.
problem_solved: delays in shipment statuses leading to operational inefficiencies
